request_payload.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we're over here footing the bill for collective defense, they're cutting corners on their commitments. Remember when Germany delayed their defense spending? That's not partnership—that's freeloading. If we don't hold them accountable, who will? Our security can't wait for empty promises. #StandFirm #AllianceAccountability
